Subject: Happy Halloween Contest and Lunch!
Message:
What are you going to be this year??? 

Please join us in our Halloween costume contest on October 31st.

Pizza and treats will be provided for the floor.
 				 					 
We hope you will join us in Halloween fun by dressing up to win a spooky prize.
The four categories will be..... Best, Scariest, funniest, and most original!!!

Which one will you be???
